breakdown: PR fixes rewards_box normalization in streaming passthrough by adding fallback key handling for non-standard LLM-generated keys ('xp'/'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces'/'gold'). The new normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function coerces values and removes legacy keys after copying. Type safety is adequate with isinstance checks but could benefit from TypedDict; test coverage is excellent with real E2E flow.
key_changes: Add normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() function handling both standard and non-standard reward keys
Update _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair() to call normalization before returning passthrough rewards
Add .pop() calls to remove legacy 'xp' and 'gold_pieces' keys after normalization
Create E2E test file verifying LLM can produce messy rewards_box that gets normalized to standard shape
